name: 7-minute Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, mix together the sugar, butter or margarine, salt, and evaporated milk.
2. Heat over medium until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue stirring and allow the mixture to boil for 7 minutes.
4. Turn off the burner and let the mixture cool slightly.
5. Add the miniature marshmallows, chocolate chips, and vanilla extract.
6. Stir until everything is melted and smooth.
7. Pour the mixture into a buttered 8-inch pan and spread evenly.
8. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
Source: Recipes Out of This World
Women of St. Agnes Catholic Church
Charleston, WV
1969
